headerTitle: Senior Software Engineer, GTM Engineering  ·  AI Workflow Automation  ·  Revenue Operations  ·  Forward-Deployed Builder
subjectText: Senior Software Engineer, GTM Engineering — Vanta (Remote) · $156K–$184K
intro: Vanta’s GTM Engineering team embeds with Sales, CS, and RevOps to identify manual workflows and ship AI-powered systems that eliminate them. Four external client engagements across eight industries, 13 production platforms — that is the exact execution model.
bullets: GTM workflow automation in production — four complete external cycles: embed with operational teams, map highest-friction workflows, ship automation, measure throughput gain, hand off. Lead intake to CRM routing, storm-alert campaign triggering, crew dispatch automation, proposal generation — all running against live operational data without further technical support.

Python, TypeScript, and automation platforms directly — 14 live Claude endpoints, webhook-driven triggers, BullMQ + Redis job queues, multi-step data transformation pipelines. Zapier, n8n, and Make all used hands-on in production alongside custom-built orchestration — choosing the right layer per workflow, not defaulting to one platform.

GTM system integration — HubSpot API and Salesforce API used directly in production CRM data flows; Stripe billing + webhooks, IMAP email parsing into CRM routing, Google OAuth2, cross-system data sync across 13 production platforms. The integration layer that keeps GTM data clean is production-grade and owned end to end.
matchNotes: Strong match: embed-and-ship GTM automation model exact, HubSpot API + Salesforce API now direct Tier 1, n8n/Zapier/Make all claimed directly, Python + TypeScript stack, LLM production endpoints, non-technical stakeholder delivery. 7+ yrs is the main stretch. No Gong/Snowflake/dbt but RevOps integration pattern is solid. $156-184K strong.
